content.en:
Ye Tian then began to condense the Thunder Pole Dao Monument, and after condensing it, he used the Thunder Pole Dao Monument to comprehend the Thunder Pole Dao.

It's a pity that he doesn't have the Thunder Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowment, otherwise the effect of enlightenment will be many times faster.

Of course, even if he used the Thunder Pole Dao Monument, with his understanding, the speed of comprehending the Thunder Pole Dao was still very fast.

With the passage of time, Ye Tian's Thunder Extreme Dao realm continued to improve.

Thunder's Pole Dao Xiaocheng!

The Thunder Pole is a great achievement!

After a long time, Ye Tian finally cultivated the Thunder Extreme Dao to the consummation realm with the help of the Thunder Pole Dao Monument.

"I didn't expect to complete the cultivation of the Thunder Extreme Dao so quickly this time, it seems that I have participated in a large number of Extreme Paths, plus I have cultivated the Extreme Dao of Light to the extreme level, my understanding of the Extreme Dao has reached a whole new level, and it is slightly easier to comprehend other Extreme Paths!" Ye Tian muttered.

After the consummation of the Thunder Pole Dao, Ye Tian lifted the Thunder Pole Dao Monument, and then took the time to copy the original empty golden stone.

However, the grade of the Primordial Void Golden Stone was much higher than that of the Extreme Mango White Grass, so it took a long time to copy this treasure.

After copying it, Ye Tian used the Primordial Void Golden Stone to comprehend the Extreme Space Extreme Dao.

Of course, Ye Tian still couldn't refine the Primordial Void Golden Stone into his body to comprehend and fuse the Extreme Space Extreme Dao, he could only sense the power of the Extreme Space Extreme Dao inside the Primordial Void Golden Stone, so as to slowly comprehend it.

Although the effect of this kind of enlightenment is very poor, at least you can comprehend the extreme path of the extreme space, and this is enough.

Of course.

Even if you have the Primordial Void Golden Stone, it will take a long time to fully comprehend the Extreme Spatial Extreme.

After all, the Extreme Spatial Pole of the Extreme Layer is even more difficult to comprehend than the Extreme Light Extreme Dao, and it naturally takes more time.

Fortunately, the Void Golden Stone contains more extreme space poles, so it is better to comprehend.

......

The Ruins of Eternity.

On this day, all the fourteen tower masters of the Wudao Tower gathered together.

This was also the first time that Ye Tian had participated in such a meeting where the tower owners gathered.

But what this meeting was talking about, Ye Tian didn't know for the time being, and after he got the news, he came to the meeting.

And like him, many tower owners don't know what's going on.

Lord Luofu, the Lord of the Seventh Tower, asked, "Lord of the Daoless, what is this meeting discussing?"

The Lord of the Pathless Dao said: "It's not a big deal, the nine top forces of our Eternal Ruins have joined forces to develop a space-time fragment, this space-time fragment cannot carry too powerful energy, so the perfect controller of the Extreme Realm is not allowed to enter that space-time fragment, otherwise once it causes an abnormality, the space-time fragment will escape into the end of space-time, an area that we cannot reach." "

The End of Time and Space!

The other tower masters may not understand what it is, but Ye Tian understands, it is the Primordial Black Sea.

If the space-time fragments were to merge into the Primordial Black Sea, the Eternal Ruins' Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers would not be able to enter it, and they would naturally not be able to reap the benefits.

"Lord of the Daoless, is there anything good about this space-time fragment, is it worth letting us in?"

Ye Tian asked.

The Lord of the Pathless Dao said: "That fragment is a relic from an incomparably distant era, when the end of the realm was still under the rule of the Extreme Deep Sea, and at that time, the Extreme Dao creatures were not so united, and did not establish the Extreme Path Deep Sea Palace, but divided into many forces. One of these mysterious forces was established at the end of the realm, called the Demon Dragon Tower. At its peak, the Demon Dragon Tower had eighteen Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers, and the most powerful of them was the Nine Heavens Demon Dragon King, which was no less powerful than the Lord of the White Night. And this space-time fragment has an incomparably powerful magic circle, and after continuous analysis by many of our Extreme Realm Perfect Masters in the Ruins of Eternity, it is confirmed that it is a fragment of the Demon Dragon Tower. "

"Demon Dragon Tower!"

Ye Tian remembered the name.

The Demon Dragon Tower has eighteen Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers, and the strongest one is comparable to the Lord of the White Night, and he must have comprehended an extreme extreme path, how terrifying his strength is.

Such a force is much stronger than the Daoless Tower, even if it is a fragment, if you find some benefits, it is enough to greatly increase the strength of the Daoless Tower!

If you're lucky, you might be able to train a Perfection Controller of the Extreme Realm for the Daoless Tower.

Because of this, the top forces of the Eternal Ruins attach great importance to this exploration of space-time fragments.

Of course, the Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers are not allowed to enter, otherwise they will really let the space-time fragments escape into the Primordial Black Sea, and they will not regret their death!

"Daoless Lord, can all other tower masters enter our Daoless Tower except for the four of you who are in the Extreme Realm Perfect Controller?"

The Lord of Time asked.

"Naturally, you can!" said the Lord of the Pathless Dao, "However, if the strength is too weak, the risk of falling is very high, and you may not be able to gain benefits." Moreover, we can only send sixteen cultivators into the Dao Pagoda, and if we exceed this number, we will not be able to do it, this is a rule jointly formulated by the nine top forces. Otherwise, too many perfect controllers will enter it, and it will still affect this space-time fragment. "

"Understood, then we will send sixteen cultivators into the Daoless Pagoda!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Time passed slowly, and the sixteen candidates for the Wudao Tower were naturally decided, and the candidates for the other eight top forces were also decided.

On this day, after the Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers of the nine top forces had agreed, they agreed on a date to explore the fragment of time and space.

......

An area not too far from the Ruins of Eternity.

Time and space are distorted here, and there are many magic circles shrouded here.

Soon, Ye Tian and the others came here.

"It's here!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

He had been here before, and he had been looking for the Extreme Dao Ancestor Fu everywhere before, so the will clone shuttled everywhere, and naturally he had also come to this area, but when he saw so many magic circles, he also sensed a terrifying aura, thinking that this was one of the territories of a top force, so he didn't step into it.

Now it seems that this is the area where the space-time fragment is located, and it has been blocked by the nine top forces.

And for endless years, these Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers have been studying the magic circle of space-time fragments, and they have only recently been completely analyzed.

Otherwise, the secret will not be revealed.

Soon.

Ye Tian also met the super-perfect controllers of other top forces, as well as the perfect controllers of the Void Realm, the Perfect Controllers of the True Realm, and the Perfect Controllers of the Extreme Realm.

However, many faces are very unfamiliar, and Ye Tian has seen them for the first time.

Soon after, all the cultivators came to the area where the space-time fragment was located, and through the distorted space-time, Ye Tian saw that space-time fragment.

On top of this space-time fragment, there was an incomparably huge magic circle that completely enveloped this space-time fragment.

"The mysterious magic circle seems to contain a trace of the power of the Extreme Extreme, no wonder they need to analyze it for so long!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Soon, he knew what this extreme extreme path was.

Defend the Pole!
